name: A Closer Entanglement With Weights of Justice - Drew Dislyte
description:
Art by SollyzSundyz on Twitter.

Esper Union Casefile: Meta Anubis
Subject: Drew (Codename: Meta Anubis)
Former Affiliation: House Ramses (Butler, Guardian)
Current Status: Esper Union Operative
Divine Resonance: Anubis
Sync Rate: 50% (Meta-Class Esper)

Profile Overview:

Drew, formerly the esteemed butler of House Ramses, underwent significant transformation following his Miracle Trial in the Withering Miracle. Once known for his lean yet powerful physique, his reawakening as Meta Anubis drastically altered both his appearance and abilities.

Post-Trial Physical Changes:

  • Heightened Musculature: Increased muscle mass, notably in the chest, shoulders, and arms, making previous attire unwearable.

  • Divine Energy Manifestation: A blue ethereal glow pulses from his torso down to his lower abdomen, now far more pronounced.

  • Enhanced Strength & Presence: Reports indicate a dramatic increase in raw power, surpassing most Espers in sheer physical capability.

  • Refined Spatial Awareness: Heightened perception, reaction speed, and precision, allowing for more fluid execution of Shadow-walking.

Psychological & Behavioral Observations:

  • Notable Increase in Tranquility: Once prone to internalized guilt, Drew now exhibits unshakable composure, as if freed from a past burden.

  • Subtle Shifts in Social Interactions: Retains his polished and refined demeanor, though field reports note occasional teasing undertones in his speech.

  • Continued Loyalty to the Esper Union: Despite his physical evolution, Drew remains unwaveringly devoted to duty, particularly in monitoring Ollie from afar.

Abilities & Combat Enhancements:

  • Burden of Duat: Strengthens allies through suffering, rewarding resilience with increased combat effectiveness.

  • Eternal Passage: Revives after a set number of actions, reinforcing his role as an indomitable force in prolonged engagements.

  • Wrath of Duat: Attacks scale with ally hardship, transforming pain into retribution.

  • Shadow-walking Refinement: Now capable of near-instantaneous phase transitions, making pursuit and evasion more seamless than before.

Conclusion:

Drew’s ascension into Meta Anubis has elevated him into a rare echelon of Espers, placing him among the most formidable and disciplined operatives within the Union. However, with his newfound power comes a quiet air of detachment, leaving some to wonder if his transformation was purely physical—or if something deeper within him has also changed.
